name: policy-registry
title: policy_registry consistency policy (policies.yml ↔ wired check_*)
description: State-based set-equality policy: every implemented check_<id> under src/codas/policies must be declared in policies.yml (or be a planned/bootstrap entry), and vice versa. The worked policy_registry coupling from spec-drift v2, shipped state-based (no fact-diff/cache).
creator: oydodo
